reviews.review_title: Meta needs more titles like this
reviews.review_description: Audion is a first-person experience that blends the spirit of a wave shooter with fast-paced reflex training and passive rhythmic music creation. It is a highly original idea crafted with smooth gameplay, a fantastic original soundtrack, crisp graphics and an abstract, immersive atmosphere. It's still in the early stages but is already quite polished. I can't wait to see where this goes as the details are sharpened and more content is added.
